**Examining Application Need**

I'm currently focused on the core purpose of this application: managing land use changes for Minh Hung Ward. I'm digging into the specific needs of the People's Committee, trying to understand what kind of data they handle and how they currently do it. This includes forms, approvals, and any existing workflows. Understanding their process is key to designing an efficient and helpful React application.


**Define Data Structures**

Now, I'm defining the essential data structures for the application based on the identified requirements. I've broken down the necessary fields, including ordinal numbers, record IDs, dates, owner information (names, addresses, IDs, land certificates), and detailed land plot characteristics (plot number, map sheet, location, areas for both total land and specific land types like residential and agricultural). The critical logic here is how agricultural land area can be calculated.


**Planning the Application's Tech**

I'm now fully immersed in the technical design. I'm choosing React 18 with TypeScript for robust type safety. Styling will be managed through Tailwind CSS for utility-first flexibility. I'm leaning toward ESM for the build and runtime and leveraging LocalStorage for data persistence in this frontend-focused demo. I've also selected the essential libraries: `lucide-react` for icons, `recharts` for insightful visualizations, and `date-fns` for date formatting, each picked for their specific roles in this project.


**Building Core UI Elements**

I'm currently focused on the dashboard's core components and storage interaction, using simple charts to visualize records per month and area stats. I've designed helper functions to manage CRUD operations with LocalStorage. The recent progress includes the UI design. I'm prioritizing a clean, professional look with a blue/indigo color scheme and a clear sidebar-content layout, and striped tables with clean headers.


**Integrating AI Lightly**

I'm now contemplating how to integrate AI within the application. While the user requested a management system and didn't mention AI explicitly, the instructions necessitate it. I've decided to add an optional, lightweight "AI Insights" component for analyzing the data, such as checking for anomalies, but it won't be essential. This approach will allow for flexibility and won't complicate the core functionality. I will prioritize building a robust CRUD system using LocalStorage as the main focus.


**Mapping Out Implementation**

I've crafted a comprehensive, step-by-step implementation plan. This includes a clear file structure: metadata for app info, the standard HTML boilerplate, the root mount, interfaces, LocalStorage wrapper, reusable input components, and the core components: header, sidebar, record form, record list, and dashboard. My focus is on ensuring these all link together. I'm also carefully refining the code as I go. For instance, I recognized that STT shouldn't be manually entered in the data table.


**Fine-tuning Data Handling**

I'm now focusing on data consistency and user experience. I'm ensuring the sequential nature of the 'STT' field is handled programmatically, relying on the ID for internal use, and making 'STT' a display property. I'm also ensuring the calculation of agricultural land area (`dtNongNghiep`) is accurate and non-negative, and that all text and labels are in Vietnamese, as requested. I've also added responsive Tailwind classes, and will implement a CSV export function for convenient data retrieval.


**Refining Implementation Steps**

I'm now fully immersed in the final implementation phase, focusing on ensuring all the pieces fit perfectly together. I'm rigorously testing the form reset functionality and implementing the crucial required field validation to enhance the user experience. The recent focus is on the `RecordList.tsx` file for data display. Also, I'm integrating the application with `App.tsx` and ensuring that all specifications have been accounted for. The next step will be to verify the user interface adheres to the administrative officer's persona.

I'm focusing on the `formData` state in `RecordForm.tsx`, hoping to find the blockage of input. Further investigation may be necessary to identify the exact cause.


**Refining the Input Logic**

I've just revisited the `RecordForm.tsx` file, specifically the `handleChange` function. I've realized a potential issue with number inputs. If a user clears a number input, the value becomes an empty string, which `parseFloat("")` converts to `NaN`. This `NaN` value might be causing the input blockage, as React could be struggling to handle it in the `value` attribute. It's likely related to how the application interprets and displays the resulting `NaN` value. I'll focus on handling empty strings or `NaN` more gracefully in the `handleChange` function. The user reports a broader issue: "không nhập được thông tin," so I believe I am on the right track here.

I'll continue tracing this issue in the code, though it doesn't seem to be a CSS issue so far.

I've just uncovered a significant issue related to number inputs and the handling of decimal points. The conversion to a number within the `onChange` event causes the decimal point to be immediately truncated, rendering the value as an integer. This is the root cause of the decimal point issue. Clearing a number input also poses a problem. Empty strings convert to `NaN` when parsed, which can lead to unpredictable behavior. I'm now zeroing in on the behavior of number inputs, specifically in relation to decimal points and empty strings. It appears the immediate parsing with `parseFloat` is the culprit. ### 2. File sửa lỗi Windows và Chạy Tự Động (`fix_and_run.bat`)

Đây là bước quan trọng nhất để khắc phục lỗi "spawn cmd.exe" trên máy bạn. Hãy tạo file `fix_and_run.bat` với nội dung dưới đây và **chạy nó thay vì chạy lệnh npm**.

**Code cho file `fix_and_run.bat`:**

```batch
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul
title Fix Windows Environment & Run QLHS Minh Hung

echo ========================================================
echo DANG SUA LOI MOI TRUONG WINDOWS...
echo ========================================================

:: Thêm đường dẫn System32 vào PATH tạm thời để fix lỗi "spawn cmd.exe"
set PATH=%PATH%;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Windows\SysWOW64

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG CAI DAT THU VIEN (Vui long cho)...
echo ========================================================
call npm install

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG BUILD UNG DUNG (Tao thu muc dist)...
echo ========================================================
call npm run build

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG KHOI DONG PHAN MEM...
echo ========================================================
:: Chạy trực tiếp Electron, bỏ qua script concurrently gây lỗi
call npx electron .

pause
```

File này sẽ tự động: sửa lỗi PATH -> cài đặt thư viện -> build thư mục `dist` -> và mở phần mềm lên cho bạn.

### 2. File `fix_and_run.bat` (Cập nhật mới)

Lỗi `Access is denied` (0x5) xảy ra do tiến trình cũ chưa thoát. Bạn hãy dùng file `.bat` mới này, tôi đã thêm lệnh **tắt nóng (kill)** các tiến trình cũ trước khi chạy lại.

```batch
@echo off
chcp 65001 >nul
title Fix Windows & Restart QLHS Minh Hung

echo ========================================================
echo DANG DON DEP TIEN TRINH CU (De tranh loi Cache/Access Denied)...
echo ========================================================
taskkill /F /IM electron.exe >nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM node.exe >nul 2>&1
taskkill /F /IM cmd.exe >nul 2>&1

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG SUA LOI MOI TRUONG...
echo ========================================================
set PATH=%PATH%;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Windows\SysWOW64

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG BUILD LAI UNG DUNG (Cap nhat file moi)...
echo ========================================================
call npm run build

echo.
echo ========================================================
echo DANG KHOI DONG PHAN MEM...
echo ========================================================
call npx electron .

pause
```
